## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run build` if build-time or env behavior changed
- [ ] Vercel preview checked for UI changes

## Change Checklist

- [ ] Prisma schema changed
- [ ] Prisma migration included
- [ ] `generated/prisma` updated
- [ ] `.env.example` updated for env changes
- [ ] Screenshots or visual notes included for UI changes
